nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and ideation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficiently creative or agency-less collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: brainstorm with AI in order to flesh out a scene

nodes.label: AI as editing and polishing tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to authentic human craft
nodes.grounding_span: incorporate AI a lot when it comes to editing my work

nodes.label: AI as visual concept and moodboard generator
nodes.label_negative: Manual visual creation or reference hunting
nodes.grounding_span: use AI to generate 'moodboard' pieces, or basic diagrams

nodes.label: AI as character roleplayer for narrative exploration
nodes.label_negative: AI as forgetful or sycophantic roleplayer
nodes.grounding_span: asking it to assume the role of a dungeon-master or character(s)

nodes.label: AI authenticity and detection concerns
nodes.label_negative: Trust in human-made art without suspicion

nodes.label: AI devaluation of human creative labor
nodes.label_negative: Fair valuation and recognition of human craft
nodes.grounding_span: devalues the hard work that creatives may put into their field

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use it to generate any part of a finished piece

nodes.label: Efficiency and workflow streamlining
nodes.grounding_span: helped to streamline a few things

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as brainstorming aid
nodes.grounding_span: nice to do some sentiment analysis and summaries

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of true agency and memory
nodes.grounding_span: frustrating. The AI would forget some information

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's impact on human authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I also wonder if that's feeding into the ongoing existential crisis of loneliness

nodes.label: Concern about AI devaluing creative work
nodes.grounding_span: devalues the hard work that creatives may put into their field

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through exclusion — generates options then discards misfits
nodes.grounding_span: having a wide list to choose from and excluding whatever doesn't feel right

nodes.label: Comparative testing — uses AI as foil to test own intuitions
nodes.grounding_span: compare its interpretations to how I *feel* they would genuinely act
